title: niphobolus rotundifolius
intro: Niphobolus rotundifolius, also known as the Round-leaved Nephrolepis or Maidenhair Fern, is a type of evergreen fern native to tropical regions. Its medicinal properties make it useful in treating various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin issues, due to the presence of compounds like flavonoids and terpenoids. The plant has been traditionally used to promote health and wellness, with reported benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Niphobolus rotundifolius can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to alleviate symptoms and support overall well-being.
